rawInstruction: Place both panels together with wrong sides facing each other. Attach yarn at any point along the edge. Work slip stitches evenly around, inserting your hook through both layers. Continue around the entire shape to join. Optional: Lightly stuff the bear before fully closing, or leave flat for a keychain-style finish. Fasten off and weave in all ends securely.
summary: Place panels wrong sides together and join with slip stitches all around, optionally stuffing before fully closing.
title: Joining the Pieces
